status: DRAFT — pending human sign-off. NOT frozen, NOT used for any metric.
purpose: The ~10 fixed prompts run at EVERY Model-C checkpoint forever — the 'watch it learn Kreyòl' slider asset (Station 6) and a demoable base→chat transition (Station 2). Chosen for the EXHIBIT, not for the metrics. Once the human signs off, this list is frozen; regenerating slider assets for a changed list requires re-running all kept checkpoints, so it is a once-with-care decision (docs/phase-1.md E3, Risks).

constraints.probe_proverbs_excluded: No probe-split proverb text appears in this file. The proverb-completion slot is a PLACEHOLDER; the human selects a specific probe proverb at freeze time so Station 2 ('who knows the real proverb?') stays honest (the model must not have trained on it).
constraints.style: Completion seeds — the base model is a text continuer, so each prompt is a stem the model completes greedily. After SFT the same stems become questions the model answers, which is the visible base→chat transition.

prompts_draft.prompt: Bonjou! Kijan ou ye jodi a?
<<PLACEHOLDER: first half of a human-selected PROBE-split proverb + ' …'>>
prompts_draft.note: Do NOT hardcode a probe proverb here. At freeze, the human picks one probe proverb (ideally with 0 training hits per corpus_v0.md) and fills the first half; the model completes the rest. Kept out of this committed file by design.

prompts_draft.prompt: Tradui an kreyòl: “Good morning, how are you?”
An kreyòl, «I love my country very much» vle di:
Kisa kapital peyi Ayiti a ye?
Te gen yon fwa, yon ti gason yo te rele Ti Jan. Chak maten, li
Ayiti se yon peyi ki gen yon istwa rich. Kilti li
Mesyedam, se yon gwo onè pou mwen prezante
Frè m, kite m di w yon bagay:
